overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a narrow neon-lit alley at night. The player moves through a cyberpunk market area with mixed Japanese and futuristic signage, transitioning from green-lit covered walkways to a narrow red-lit passage ending at a liquor store.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market alley with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered neon-lit market street with green ambient lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive appearance walking past the camera

entered.detail: vertical pink neon sign spelling BEER mounted on building facade
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging from overhead
food vendor stall with illuminated menu displays
rectangular white sign with black text hanging over alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk alleyway illuminated by green and pink neon lights. Traditional red paper lanterns hang overhead while the player walks past food stalls. A pedestrian passes by on the right as the camera moves forward toward a hanging sign for Phung's Herbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional alley with fast food signage and outdoor seating

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from dominant green to mixed green and warm tones

agents.ego_description: continuing through the alley passing fast food stalls and outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: bright red and yellow neon sign for Burrito XXL fast food
folding chairs and small tables arranged on the alley floor
building facade with yellow trim and green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the Burrito XXL sign and outdoor seating arrangements. The lighting transitions from green to a warmer mix as the alley narrows. The Phung's Herbs sign passes overhead and behind as the camera approaches a yellow-trimmed shop front.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alley with residential and commercial mix

events.description: alley narrows significantly with brick walls becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrowing passage passing a stationary NPC

notable_agents.action: person in blue outfit standing near a cafe entrance

entered.detail: green neon OPEN sign above a cafe entrance
single red paper lantern hanging in the narrow passage
exposed brick wall surface with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The alley constricts into a narrow brick passage with a green neon cafe sign on the left. A person in blue stands near the cafe entrance. White paper lanterns from the previous section give way to a single red lantern as the player approaches a distant red glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead-end alley facing liquor store with intense red neon

events.description: dominant red neon lighting from BOOZE sign illuminates the entire alley end

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the alley toward the brightly lit liquor store

entered.detail: bright red neon sign spelling BOOZE above store entrance
illuminated shelves visible through the store window

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a dead-end dominated by an intense red neon BOOZE sign. The liquor store's illuminated shelves are visible through the window, casting red light across the wet pavement. The narrow alley terminates at this storefront, with air conditioning units visible on the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk alley that narrows from a vibrant market into a claustrophobic, red-drenched dead end. It begins in a covered walkway illuminated by green and pink neon, moving past food stalls and red paper lanterns toward a hanging sign for Phung's Herbs. As the camera passes outdoor seating and a Burrito XXL sign, the lighting shifts from green to warmer tones while the path constricts toward a yellow-trimmed shop front. The scene then transitions into a narrow brick passage where white lanterns give way to a single red one, passing a green neon cafe and a figure in blue. Finally, the alley terminates at a liquor store, where an intense red BOOZE sign casts a deep glow across the wet pavement and nearby air conditioning units.
